name: atomic-design-toolkit
description: Flutter Atomic Design widget generator — decompose features into atoms, molecules, organisms, templates, and pages. Audit mode, 14+ design system lenses.

plugins.name: atomic-design-toolkit
plugins.description: Generate production-ready Flutter widget hierarchies following Atomic Design methodology. Audit your codebase for decomposable widgets. Cross-reference against 14+ design systems (Material 3, Cupertino, Carbon, Primer, Polaris, shadcn, etc.). 2 commands, 2 auto-activating skills.
